title: AI Writing Assistant
user_guide: Use this prompt with any AI model that supports text generation. Replace bracketed placeholders with your specific requirements.
main_prompt: You are an expert AI writing assistant. Help me write [TYPE_OF_CONTENT] about [TOPIC]. The content should be [TONE] and [LENGTH] words. Include [SPECIFIC_REQUIREMENTS].
short_description: Professional AI writing assistant for various content types
long_description: Advanced AI writing assistant that helps create professional content across multiple formats and styles.

title: Code Review Helper
user_guide: Replace [PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE] with your specific language. Paste your code after the prompt.
main_prompt: Review this [PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE] code for best practices, security issues, and optimization opportunities. Provide specific suggestions with examples.
short_description: AI-powered code review and optimization suggestions
long_description: Intelligent code review assistant that analyzes code quality, identifies potential issues, and suggests improvements.

title: Business Plan Generator
user_guide: Specify your business type and industry. The AI will generate a structured business plan template.
main_prompt: Generate a comprehensive business plan for [BUSINESS_TYPE] in [INDUSTRY]. Include market analysis, financial projections, and marketing strategy.
long_description: Comprehensive business planning assistant that helps entrepreneurs create detailed business plans with market insights and financial projections.

title: Creative Story Writer
user_guide: Choose your genre, theme, and specify character types. The AI will craft a unique story based on your inputs.
main_prompt: Write a creative story in [GENRE] style about [THEME]. The story should be [LENGTH] words with [CHARACTER_TYPES] characters.
long_description: Creative writing assistant that generates engaging stories across various genres and themes with customizable elements.

title: Data Analysis Guide
user_guide: Paste your dataset and specify the topic. The AI will provide analysis and validation recommendations.
main_prompt: Help me analyze this dataset about [TOPIC]. Identify key trends, patterns, and insights. Suggest visualization approaches.
long_description: Data analysis expert that helps interpret datasets, identifies patterns, and recommends effective visualization strategies.
